texto: Stories nurture our connection to place and to each other. They show us where we have been and where we can go. They remind us of how to be human, how to live alongside the other lives that animate this planet. ... When we lose stories, our understanding of the world is less rich, less true.
explicacao: Citação de Susan J. Tweit sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Stories nurture our connection to place and to each other. They show us where we have been and wh…” articula reflexao, memoir, nature em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como nature e stories.

texto: There is no symbolism to these fish, as Hemingway wrote. A cabezon is just a cabezon; a garibaldi, a garibaldi. But what wonderful stories they tell us about life in the ocean!
